def negative_python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_locale_timezone_loaded_per_request():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_locale_timezone_loaded_per_request"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag locale or timezone data loaded for every request instead of cached process state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
